title: LO Pump Mechanical Seal Leak
description: Oil leak detected at pump shaft seal during routine rounds
root_cause: Mechanical seal wear - carbon face scoring
corrective_action: Seal replaced with spare. Pump tested at operating pressure.

title: AC Compressor High Pressure Trip
description: HP switch tripping at 28 bar. Condenser showing reduced airflow
root_cause: Fouled condenser coil and faulty HP pressure switch
corrective_action: Condenser cleaned; HP switch replaced. System tested stable at 22 bar.

title: Watermaker High Salinity Alarm
description: TDS reading spiked to 650ppm during production
root_cause: Membrane fouling - insufficient chemical clean cycle
corrective_action: Emergency flush performed. Chemical clean scheduled. Membranes at 3yr life.

title: Generator 2 Low Oil Pressure Warning
description: Oil pressure dropping to 2.8 bar at idle. Normal is 3.5 bar minimum
corrective_action: Oil sample sent for analysis. Monitoring pressure trend.

title: Fuel Injector Deviation ME Port
description: Injector 1 showing 8% deviation on test bench. Exceeds 5% tolerance
corrective_action: New injector on order. ETA 22-MAR. Running on remaining injectors.
